data.body:
=== EPIC COMPLETE ===
All children closed: (a) 5ab2 CI/lint/format; (b) 4168 mutation testing; (c) e143 full 3-interface coverage (+ roam-crone-disco sign/verify schemas); (d) cf14 test reorg along seams; 25ae Jira link/relation sync (implemented end-to-end + live-validated); (e) 6623 Opus SDET review loop (round 2 gate PASSES — zero important/critical findings).
AC MET: all children closed; CI green on a clean checkout (d3478fbe — all matrix jobs + lint); final SDET review reports no important/critical findings.
DISCOVERED WORK left open (NOT epic-blocking, tracked): d843 was implemented+closed (acli subprocess timeout/process-group reap + link write-safety); 4a48 external-test-leak fixed+closed; remaining open: c16f (network-git timeouts), 8874 (reducer UUID-vs-filename tie-break doc mismatch), 25ae's bendy-titan follow-ups n/a. The test suite grew to broad 1812 + integration 19; ruff/mypy-core gating; external tier confined behind REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL + credential-scoped CI.
